proposed_concepts.name: ae-cli
proposed_concepts.spec: Top-level CLI class that parses arguments via `args`, routes to subcommands, and writes JSON or human-readable output to stdout.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Every command exits through a single output path; JSON mode is the default and `--human` is opt-in.

proposed_concepts.name: codex-exec-generation-engine
proposed_concepts.spec: `CodexExecGenerationEngine` orchestrates LLM inference via `CodexExecInferenceClient` to produce codex executable artifacts from a given spec.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Generation is stateless per call; the engine does not persist intermediate results itself.

proposed_concepts.name: codex-exec-inference-client
proposed_concepts.spec: `CodexExecInferenceClient` wraps the model API call, encapsulating prompt construction and response parsing for codex exec generation.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Client is consumed only by `CodexExecGenerationEngine`; callers do not construct it directly.

proposed_concepts.name: safe-file-writer
proposed_concepts.spec: `SafeFileWriter` accepts a batch of `FileWriteRequest` objects (with `SafeWriteOptions`) and writes each atomically, returning a `SafeWriteBatchResult` containing per-file `FileWriteResult` and `FileWriteStatus` values.
proposed_concepts.invariant: A write either fully succeeds or leaves the target file unchanged; partial writes are never observable.

proposed_concepts.name: embedded-cli-resources
proposed_concepts.spec: `EmbeddedCliResources` surfaces bundled static assets (templates, prompts, docs) that are compiled into the CLI binary, accessed without filesystem I/O at runtime.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Resources are read-only and immutable for the lifetime of the process.

proposed_concepts.name: embedded-document-store
proposed_concepts.spec: `EmbeddedDocumentStore` provides keyed access to embedded markdown/YAML documents, enabling subcommands to retrieve reference material without external file dependencies.
proposed_concepts.invariant: All documents are present at startup or the store fails fast; there are no lazy-load failures at query time.

proposed_concepts.name: skill-template-providers
proposed_concepts.spec: `EmbeddedSkillTemplateProvider` and `FileSkillTemplateProvider` implement a common provider interface: the embedded variant reads from bundled assets; the file variant reads from a filesystem path.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Both providers expose the same interface so callers are agnostic to the backing source.

proposed_concepts.name: spec-export
proposed_concepts.spec: `exportSpec` serialises the full agentic-executable specification into a `SpecExportResult` suitable for downstream consumption (e.g. publishing, diffing, or seeding a canonical matrix).
proposed_concepts.invariant: `SpecExportResult` is a pure value object; export has no side effects beyond producing the result.
